market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Defense tech is flooded with money, but who’s built to last?
articles.description: Defense tech is red hot right now. Anduril and Mach Industries just doubled and quadrupled their valuations, respectively, and the U.S. government is proposing a 40% increase in defense budget. A wave of new startups is chasing those government

articles.title: Bitmine's Ethereum bet nears $9 billion loss as ether falls below $1,800
articles.description: Shares of Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury firm hit their lowest level since the company's crypto pivot as ETH revisits the February lows.

articles.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
articles.description: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

articles.title: Meta mercifully spun out VR fitness game Supernatural instead of just killing it
articles.description: Meta appears to have listened to the Supernatural users who protested the app's sad fate after sweeping layoffs.

articles.title: Crypto PAC-supported candidates sweep US state primaries after media buys
articles.description: Nearly a dozen candidates across three US states won their primaries or will advance to the November election after they were supported by $3.5 million in ads funded by crypto industry-aligned PACs.

articles.title: Substack’s new ‘Reply Rules’ feature lets creators control how people respond
articles.description: Substack's new Reply Rules feature is currently available for all English-language publications and is designed to give creators greater control over how their audiences respond.

articles.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
articles.description: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.

articles.title: New DeFi entrant widens field of crypto political campaign funds as elections loom
articles.description: The Defend Developers PAC is aiming to contribute to lawmakers who seek to shield crypto developers from legal vulnerabilities.

articles.title: Bitcoin isn't crashing because of Saylor, it's losing the momentum trade
articles.description: Bitcoin's recent weakness reflects a broader rotation into AI, IPOs and other momentum trades rather than concerns about Michael Saylor's bitcoin sales, according to Charles Schwab's Jim Ferraioli.

articles.title: Agentic payment activity tops 100M transactions on Base
articles.description: New data suggests AI-driven payment rails are evolving beyond experimentation as users are making more higher-value transfers.

articles.title: Carvana ties up with Bezos-backed Slate Auto as it plans new car sales
articles.description: Carvana was granted a warrant to buy shares in Slate last year, according to documents obtained by TechCrunch. Guggenheim Partners CEO Mark Walter is heavily invested in both companies.

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: What about the American consumer?
articles.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Alex Tapscott on the stalling of the CLARITY Act and how it's impacting the average American consumer. Then, Aisha Hunt writes that crypto will grow by upgrading Wall Street’s trusted products rather than replacing them.

articles.title: Instagram is alerting users who were targeted by hackers during AI chatbot attacks
articles.description: Hackers appeared to take over victims’ accounts even after Meta said it fixed its AI-powered support chatbot, which granted hackers access to victims’ accounts.

articles.title: Bitcoin copying 2022 'almost perfectly' as trader sees key support failing
articles.description: Bitcoin traders warned of a key BTC price support trend line failing as 2022 bear market history continued to repeat.

articles.title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
articles.description: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.

articles.title: Hyperliquid bear turns bullish after losing over $46M shorting HYPE
articles.description: The whale is now backing Arthur Hayes’ favored HYPE, ZEC and NEAR plays, signaling a sharp pivot toward momentum-led crypto bets.

articles.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
articles.description: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

articles.title: Ethereum drops to 14-week lows: Can ETH price hold $1.8K support?
articles.description: Ethereum price slides to a 14-week low as weakening demand and persistent ETF outflows put the key $1,800 support at risk.

articles.title: Still facing copyright lawsuits, AI music generator Suno raises another $400M
articles.description: The prominent AI music-generation startup is now valued at over $5.4 billion -- about seven months ago, it raised at a $2.45 billion valuation.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
